text.message: You can have that 3-1 on brick 8 blue I won’t race you
Red already got a city smh
I’m at 3 without a single road and you rob me lol
making the worse play just to sabotage me lol
Already told you I’d give you the 3-1
So tbh, you made the worst play going for wheat port
Haha I can trade you wood.
OJ do you have any brick?
Black took my wood now trying to trade it for hay. Noice
